title: Payroll Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Outsourced payroll services in Vietnam — gross-to-net calculations, SHUI insurance, personal income tax filing and labor compliance, delivered accurately and on time.

hero.title: Payroll Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: InCorp Vietnam simplifies payroll and ensures compliance across every HR aspect — including payroll, insurance and personal income taxes.

items.title: Payroll Processing
items.desc: Gross-to-net calculations, tax handling and salary payment lists.

items.title: Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance
items.desc: Monthly SHUI reporting, claims management and card issuance.

items.title: Personal Income Tax (PIT)
items.desc: Prepare and submit monthly and quarterly PIT declarations, online and in hard copy.

items.title: Labor Compliance
items.desc: Employee documentation, contract management and regulatory filings.

sections.heading: Why choose our payroll service
items: Maintain constant compliance while reducing costs.
Partner with HR experts backed by a global team.
Accurate and timely reporting across payroll, insurance and taxes.
Enhanced accuracy and scalability for seasonal workforce changes.

items.title: Submit your details
items.desc: Share your company information and payroll needs.

items.title: Complete KYC verification
items.desc: We verify documents and prepare your account.

items.title: Begin operations
items.desc: Select a plan and we start running your payroll.

items.q: Can I hire remotely without establishing a Vietnamese legal entity?
items.a: Yes. Our Employer of Record service lets you hire in Vietnam without setting up your own entity, while we manage payroll and compliance.

items.q: Can you set up international payroll for our team in Vietnam?
items.a: Yes. We handle the full payroll setup and run it on your behalf, including gross-to-net calculations, PIT and insurance.

items.q: Can the service package be customised?
items.a: Yes. We tailor the scope of payroll, insurance, tax and HR support to match your company's specific needs.

sections.title: Run payroll in Vietnam with confidence
sections.subtitle: Let our experts deliver accurate, compliant payroll every cycle.
